role: Walk-only connector from Southgate parking/checkpoint into civic-ration alleys leading toward Drip Saints territory.
gameplay_notes: This is a walk-only inner-city connector, not a van-driving chunk.
Use invisible Red Concord detection cones around gate/cameras/guards later in Phaser.
Use this as the transition from Southgate parking/checkpoint to Drip Saints civic-ration alleys.
Overlay contains wires, lamps, cameras, pipes, gate/prop details; do not use overlay as collision.
Doors/gates that open later should be separate interactive assets.
